text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup, or as Zenno Rob Roy calls it,
"Hexennacht"—the night of the witches—is over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And Manhattan Cafe put in a performance to be
proud of...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Cafe, you were great out there...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Remember when we talked about that evil witch?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, Rob Roy... Yes, I remember...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Well, judging from your performance today... I
don't think you're cursed at all. In fact, you were
incandescent...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
If something really is guiding you, then... I believe
it's a good witch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're in the dark on a lot of things. Even so, it
doesn't seem like any kind of bad luck has
befallen Manhattan Cafe after the race.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer, um!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Manhattan Cafe did well in the race,
she approaches me afterwards with a concerned
look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's this way. My friend is saying to come this
way...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Something's... there. Something that's never been
there before. And shouldn't be.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hurry, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I follow her to see...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: This place... is familiar...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That day, a year and a half ago, there was an
Umamusume here by herself... and several golden
gears that shined brightly even from afar...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
They stopped dead in their tracks, all on their
own. I don't know why. But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creeeaaak!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That sound!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Why hello, you two.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Farewell for good... Heh-heh, now that's a phrase
that didn't hold much weight.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, well since you're here, stay right there and
watch.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: The entirety of my press conference, that is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next instant, the venue is bustling with
people.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All of you gathered here today, I want you to
listen closely.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I, Agnes Tachyon, will be resuming my racing
career at the upcoming Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her announcement comes as abruptly as the one
she made about her indefinite hiatus.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon! First you quit, and now you're
back to running, what in the world's going on?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, a lot has happened, and my circumstances
are complex at the best of times.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Owing to their complexity, there are some
matters I cannot discuss. But others I can
summarize simply.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
At the Arima Kinen, I will be competing against
Manhattan Cafe—yes, she's right there—to win
the Grand Prix!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And I will spare nothing in my efforts. That
concludes my announcement.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod without saying a word. There's no running
from this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A chill runs down my back. What kind of
circumstances could possibly have led to this?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Tachyon, tell us a little more!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
More? I've already said it all. I'm going to run.
Since I've announced it, I can run now. That's all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon makes her exit as a pack of
reporters give chase.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Arima Kinen, and yesterday's
friend now stands in our way as a rival.
